name: Shrimp Scampi Dnsr31a
recipeIngredient: Shrimp, large, peeled and deveined - 1 pound
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crushed garlic, salt, dry mustard, pepper, chopped parsley, lemon juice, and oil in a bowl to make a marinade.
2. Add the shrimp to the marinade and marinate for 2 hours.
3. Preheat the broiler.
4. Place the shrimp on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, 4 inches from the heat source.
5. Brush the shrimp with the marinade during broiling until they are cooked through.
6. Serve the shrimp hot with rice.
